vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-539: feat: image paste support in activity view conversation

plan.title: feat: image paste support in activity view conversation
plan.author: agent:claude-sonnet-4-6

narratives.Problem: Users cannot share images with Claude Code agents via the conversation composer. The ComposerFooter in ConversationPanel only accepts plain text, requiring users to manually upload files and type paths — friction that breaks workflow.
narratives.Proposal: Intercept paste/drop events on the ComposerFooter wrapper div to capture image clipboard data. Upload the image to a new POST /api/conversations/:name/upload-image endpoint (which saves to OS temp dir). Show a thumbnail preview with a remove button. On submit, prepend @/tmp/... path lines before the message text — Claude Code's Read tool handles the @path syntax natively, converting the file to a vision content block automatically.

narrative.Action: Add a new route to src/dashboard/server/routes/conversations.ts: POST /api/conversations/:name/upload-image. Accepts JSON body { filename: string, data: string (base64), mimeType: string }. Validates mimeType against allowlist (image/png, image/jpeg, image/gif, image/webp). Derives file extension from mimeType. Decodes base64 and saves to OS temp dir as panopticon-paste-{uuid}.{ext} using fs/promises.writeFile. Returns { path: string } with the absolute file path. Returns 400 for missing/invalid fields, 404 if conversation not found.

subItems.title: POST /api/conversations/:name/upload-image returns { path } with an absolute OS temp file path
Rejects mimeTypes not in [image/png, image/jpeg, image/gif, image/webp] with 400
Uses fs/promises.writeFile (no sync FS calls)
Saved filename matches pattern panopticon-paste-{uuid}.{ext} in os.tmpdir()
Returns 404 if conversation name is not found in DB

items.title: Register TTL cleanup for temp paste files on server startup

narrative.Action: In src/dashboard/server/main.ts, register a setInterval that runs every 60 seconds. Each tick: async-read os.tmpdir(), filter filenames matching /^panopticon-paste-/, check mtime, and delete files older than 5 minutes using fs/promises.unlink. Must be fully async (no readdirSync/statSync/unlinkSync). Log deletions at debug level.

subItems.title: setInterval registered in main.ts (not in the route file)
Deletes panopticon-paste-* files from os.tmpdir() older than 5 minutes
No sync FS calls (readdir, stat, unlink must all use fs/promises variants)

items.title: Add paste and drag-drop image capture to ComposerFooter

narrative.Action: In src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/ComposerFooter.tsx: Add onPaste handler on the outer wrapper div (not on ComposerPromptEditor/Lexical). When paste event contains image ClipboardItems, call e.preventDefault() and extract the File via item.getAsFile(). Add onDrop handler on the same div for drag-drop support (prevent default, extract image files from dataTransfer.files). For each image: assign a local id, create an object URL for preview, add to pendingImages state as { id, file, previewUrl, serverPath: null | string, error: null | string }. Immediately trigger upload to /api/conversations/:name/upload-image. On upload success: set serverPath. On upload failure: set error. Text paste events must NOT be intercepted — only image types.

subItems.title: Ctrl+V with an image in clipboard adds the image to pendingImages state and triggers upload
Dragging an image file onto the composer adds it and triggers upload
Pasting plain text is NOT intercepted — Lexical handles it normally
Multiple images can be pasted/dropped; each appears as a separate thumbnail
Upload failure shows error state on the thumbnail (not a silent failure)

items.title: Show image thumbnail strip in ComposerFooter with remove button

narrative.Action: In ComposerFooter.tsx, render a thumbnail strip above the editor when pendingImages is non-empty. Each thumbnail shows: a small image preview (48x48px or similar), the filename truncated, a spinner while uploading, an error badge if upload failed, and a × button to remove. The × button calls URL.revokeObjectURL and removes from pendingImages state. Thumbnails sit inside the composerBox container so they feel integrated with the editor. Style should match the existing composerBox/composerToolbar aesthetic.

subItems.title: Thumbnail appears immediately after paste/drop (before upload completes)
× button removes the image and revokes its object URL
Spinner shown while upload is in progress
Strip is hidden when pendingImages is empty

items.title: Prepend @path lines to message on submit

narrative.Action: Modify handleSubmit in ComposerFooter.tsx. Before sending: check if any pendingImages have no serverPath yet (still uploading) — if so, show a toast and abort (user must wait). Filter to images that have serverPath (exclude errored). Build prefix: join serverPaths as '@{path}\n' lines. Final message = prefix + '\n' + messageText (or just prefix if messageText is empty). After successful sendConversationMessage: revoke all object URLs, clear pendingImages state.

subItems.title: Submitted message contains @/tmp/panopticon-paste-*.ext lines before user text
If any image is still uploading, submit is blocked with a toast notification
pendingImages cleared and object URLs revoked after successful send
Image-only message (no text) sends just the @path lines
